upload.title: Upload Site
upload.subtitle: Enterprise workflow for daily/office ingestion, validation, and merge tracking.
upload.runDateHint: Default is today. Click to change.
upload.switchTypeHint: Switching Daily/Office clears currently loaded files.
upload.switchTypeConfirm: Switching batch type will clear currently loaded files. Continue?
upload.reviewReadyHint: Batch is {{status}}. Manual review opens when status reaches review_ready.
upload.reviewReadyNowHint: Batch processing completed. You can open Manual Review now.
upload.creatingHint: Batch is being created and queued. Please wait...
upload.doneHint: Merge finished. Workflow reached done state.
upload.queue.skipReasonExceeded: Exceeded max page limit {{limit}}. Submit the batch first, then manually enter in review.
upload.queue.skipReasonFallback: Skipped for auto extraction. Submit the batch first, then manually enter in review.
upload.dropzoneDefaultTitle: Drop PDFs here or browse from local disk.
upload.dropzoneDefaultDesc: Only .pdf files are accepted for M1.
review.title: Manual Review
review.subtitle: Edit extracted fields by category, then submit results in one step.
review.noBatch: No batch found. Create a batch from Upload Management first.
review.onlyReviewReady: Batch is {{status}}. Submit is enabled only when status is review_ready.
review.section.barDesc: Daily BAR receipts: store name and amount verification.
review.section.zbonDesc: Daily ZBON summary: amount and date verification.
review.section.officeDesc: Office invoices: sender/tax metadata and amount verification.
review.confirmDesc: After finishing review edits, submit to save review and queue merge. Re-submit is supported.
review.larkComingSoon: Coming Soon: full Lark source integration will be enabled with backend support.
review.reportError.skipped: No type changes detected. Nothing to report.
review.reportError.failed: Failed to report type errors. Please retry.
review.skipReasonExceeded: Exceeded max page limit {{limit}}, please enter manually.
review.skipReasonFallback: This file was skipped for auto extraction. Please enter manually.
review.invalidLarkUrl: Please enter a valid Lark sheet URL.
review.submitFailed: Review submission failed. Please check system error and retry.
review.submitRepeatHint: Review submitted. You can submit again to regenerate reviewed.json and related Excel outputs.
review.doneAndResubmitHint: Review complete, merge succeeded. You can open the result, or submit again to regenerate outputs.
review.submitBlockedWhileProcessing: Batch is {{status}}. Please wait for current processing to finish before submitting again.
review.localUploadFailed: Local monthly excel source upload failed. Please retry.
review.mergeQueueFailed: Review saved, but merge queue failed. Please retry.
review.retryMergeFailed: Retry merge failed. Batch must be in failed state with submitted review rows.
review.previewUnavailable: Preview is unavailable for this row: missing preview URL/path and local file.
review.openMergedResultUnavailable: Merged result link is unavailable. Backend should return output_url/download_url or an absolute output path.
review.openMergedResultNotFound: Merged result cannot be opened directly. File path: {{status}}
